Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\Daniel\\OneDrive\\Documents\\GitHub\\genMyTee-Claude" && gh pr create --base development --title "fix: layout controls + preview CSS en tiempo real" --body "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- **Fix backend bug**: `createMockupTask\(\)` usaba dimensiones vacías \(1800x2400 default\) en vez de las reales del variant Printful — ahora pasa `fileSpec` correcto
- **Fix fallback silencioso**: cuando Printful rechaza posición custom, ahora siempre lanza `LAYOUT_NOT_SUPPORTED` en vez de devolver mockup sin cambios silenciosamente
- **Preview CSS en tiempo real**: al mover sliders, el usuario ve la imagen moverse/escalarse sobre la prenda instantáneamente \(sin esperar a Printful\)
- **Layout probe**: nuevo servicio que testea compatibilidad de layout por producto al arrancar el servidor, cachea resultados y expone `supports_layout` en API catálogo
- **`preview_print_area`** en cada producto de `products.json` para el overlay CSS

## Test plan
- [ ] Desplegar en Render y verificar que el servidor arranca sin errores
- [ ] Verificar logs del layout probe \(debe testear productos y generar cache\)
- [ ] Generar un diseño → ver mockup inicial de Printful
- [ ] Mover sliders → ver preview CSS instantáneo \(imagen se mueve sobre la prenda\)
- [ ] Click "Ver mockup real" → Printful devuelve mockup con posición ajustada
- [ ] Probar con producto que no soporte layout → controles no deben aparecer
- [ ] `npm test` — 47/47 tests pasan

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF

Bash(cd "C:/Users/Daniel/OneDrive/Documents/GitHub/genMyTee-Claude" && gh pr create --base development --head feat/sprint9-auth --title "fix: 26 security fixes — XSS, rate limiting, OAuth CSRF" --body "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary

- **6 XSS vulnerabilities fixed**: SSR escaping \(tags, IDs, slugs, JSON-LD\), DOM APIs replacing innerHTML for user data \(avatar, prompts, design cards\)
- **Rate limiting** on all auth endpoints \(login, register, verify-email\) + CAPTCHA on registration + verification code brute-force protection
- **Google OAuth CSRF** protection via state parameter + cookie validation
- **12 quality fixes**: cached file reads, authFetch improvements, email validation, password max length, session cleanup, dead code removal, UI error feedback

## Details

### Security \(HIGH — 8 findings\)
| Fix | Files |
|-----|-------|
| XSS: escapeHtml with single quotes, slug regex validation | routes/gallery.js |
| XSS: JSON-LD `</script>` injection protection | routes/gallery.js |
| XSS: DOM APIs for avatar_url, prompts, design cards | mi-cuenta.html, auth.js |
| XSS: escaped product_key in data attributes | gallery.js |
| Rate limiting: login 5/email/15m, register 3/IP/15m, verify 3/email/15m | routes/auth.js |
| CAPTCHA \(Turnstile\) on registration | routes/auth.js |
| Verification code lockout after 5 failed attempts | services/auth.js |
| OAuth state parameter + cookie CSRF protection | services/auth.js, routes/auth.js |

### Quality \(MEDIUM/LOW — 18 findings\)
- Cached JSON reads \(no readFileSync per request\)
- authFetch: Content-Type only on POST, res.ok check
- Email regex validation, password max 256 chars
- Probabilistic expired session cleanup
- Sitemap filters designs without images
- Dead code removal \(EMAIL_TEMPLATES, unused variable\)
- Verification error feedback in UI
- revokeAllSessions\(\) service function

## Test plan
- [x] 279 tests pass \(12 new: rate limiting, CAPTCHA, email validation, password length, verification attempts, OAuth\)
- [x] Vibe council: 2 judges PASS
- [ ] Manual: test login/register rate limiting returns 429
- [ ] Manual: test Google OAuth flow with state parameter
- [ ] Manual: verify gallery SSR pages render correctly

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)" 2>&1)
